headline: First Solar (FSLR) Valuation Check After Q1 Beat Guidance Reaffirmation And Tariff Tailwinds
summary: First Solar (FSLR) is back in focus after reporting first quarter 2026 results, with higher sales, higher profits and reaffirmed full year guidance, alongside an analyst upgrade that highlights potential benefits from protective tariffs. See our latest analysis for First Solar. The earnings beat and reaffirmed guidance have helped the stock regain some footing, with a 1-month share price return of 8.10% and a 7-day share price return of 4.05%. However, the share price remains down 19.83% year...
